wave_status.second_wave: consume for external boundary, bridge continuity, and voice-to-doctrine organs after their manifests exist
wave_status.deferred: real private lesson ingestion, live Task Ledger consumption, raw seed assimilation, and operator-thread learning

purpose: Prove that every landed organ produces either a concrete pattern-surface refinement or a typed nothing_to_refine receipt with stewardship checks, next-best-lane evidence, and a reentry condition.

records: one synthetic organ landing that updates a fixture manifest, validator contract, skill, standard, paper module, doctrine candidate, or pattern binding row
must cite changed_surface_ref, source_pattern_ids, receipt_ref, and anti_claim
one synthetic organ landing with refinement_result=nothing_to_refine
must carry stewardship_checked=true, next_best_lane_checked, next_best_lane_result, and reentry_condition
one landed organ with no refinement and no typed nothing_to_refine receipt
expected to fail with MISSING_PATTERN_ASSIMILATION_CLOSEOUT, MISSING_STEWARDSHIP_CHECK, and MISSING_REENTRY_CONDITION

denylist class ids only: real_raw_seed, prompt_body, provider_payload_body, live_task_ledger_row, operator_thread_content, chatgpt_hud_live_data, cockpit_live_state, prediction_market_private_material, private_memory_body, release_or_publication_packet_body

validator_rules: Every Wave 1 organ listed in core/acceptance/first_wave_acceptance.json must have exactly one pattern-assimilation decision row.
A refinement decision passes only when it names an allowed owner surface and records a changed_surface_ref or receipt_ref.
A nothing_to_refine decision passes only when stewardship_checked is true, next_best_lane_checked is non-empty, next_best_lane_result is recorded, and reentry_condition is concrete.
The missing_closeout_case must fail with all expected stable error codes and must not be counted as an accepted closeout.

A decision row that cites private raw seed, prompt bodies, provider payloads, live Task Ledger rows, operator thread bodies, HUD/browser/cockpit state, prediction/market material, or release/publication surfaces fails private_state_scan.
The acceptance receipt must retain anti_claim and authority_ceiling so closeout learning cannot be mistaken for public implementation proof.

Autonomy-seed closeout rows must cite the macro pattern autonomy process contract, latest same-lane receipt detection, a concrete edit or exact blocker capture, validation commands, validation status, and a self_refire_target.

If adjacent same-lane autonomy receipts repeat the same self_refire_target.target_artifact_ref, the later receipt must either change that target artifact or cite residual_capture_refs with exact unblock conditions.

A pass_with_residual_capture same-lane run must carry residual_lifecycle_review evidence, resolve each residual ref through Task Ledger authority, prove durable unblock/acceptance text, and recheck any reused residual refs.

autonomy_process_ratchet_contract_v1.anti_claim: This binding extends pattern-assimilation closeout to macro autonomy process receipts only. It does not execute future public builders or authorize public-root writes.

autonomy_fixed_point_negative_case_contr.expected_rejection: A same-lane autonomy run that appends its receipt but skips ordered dry-run, truth-index, and readiness refresh, omits required changed refs, or closes before readiness consumes the latest same-lane JSONL row must be rejected as stale fixed-point closeout.
autonomy_fixed_point_negative_case_contr.public_private_boundary_note: This negative case is schema-only and synthetic. It may reference macro-side artifact paths and failure-code ids, but it must not include raw seed text, prompt bodies, provider payloads, operator thread bodies, live Task Ledger rows, cockpit/HUD/browser state, release packets, recipient packets, website surfaces, prediction material, or market-private evidence.
autonomy_fixed_point_negative_case_contr.anti_claim: This binding sharpens macro-side pattern-assimilation fixture coverage for autonomy seed closeout only. It does not execute public builders, write public code, authorize public-root writes, or certify public runtime behavior.

autonomy_residual_lifecycle_negative_cas.expected_rejection: A pass_with_residual_capture same-lane autonomy row that lacks residual_lifecycle_review, cites a residual ref outside Task Ledger authority, lacks durable unblock/acceptance text, or reuses an old residual without recheck commands must be rejected as stale residual closeout.
autonomy_residual_lifecycle_negative_cas.public_private_boundary_note: This negative case is schema-only and synthetic. It may reference macro-side artifact paths, Task Ledger id shapes, and failure-code ids, but it must not include raw seed text, prompt bodies, provider payloads, operator thread bodies, live Task Ledger rows, cockpit/HUD/browser state, release packets, recipient packets, website surfaces, prediction material, or market-private evidence.
autonomy_residual_lifecycle_negative_cas.anti_claim: This binding sharpens macro-side residual lifecycle coverage for autonomy seed closeout only. It does not execute public builders, write public code, authorize public-root writes, resolve the residual itself, or certify public runtime behavior.

negative_case.expected_result: A landed organ without refinement and without a typed nothing_to_refine receipt is rejected by acceptance and recorded as a closeout failure.

negative_case_coverage_contract_v1.public_private_boundary_note: Public fixtures may use synthetic rows, metadata-only handles, schema-only examples, and path/class refs; non-public content bodies, live operator state, private source bodies, and forbidden live evidence remain excluded.
negative_case_coverage_contract_v1.anti_claim: This fixture manifest attachment enumerates macro-side negative-case coverage only. It does not execute validators, build public code, authorize public-root writes, or certify public runtime behavior.

anti_claim_assertions: a landed organ is not closed by success alone; it must emit a concrete refinement or typed nothing_to_refine receipt
nothing_to_refine cannot pass without stewardship_checked, next_best_lane_checked, next_best_lane_result, and reentry_condition
a local lesson cannot upgrade itself into global doctrine without evidence-gated propagation through the owning surface

synthetic closeout fixtures must reject raw seed bodies, prompt bodies, provider payload bodies, live Task Ledger rows, operator thread bodies, HUD/browser/cockpit state, prediction material, release material, hosted-public material, and website material
duplicate refinement receipt ids fail rather than double-counting learning closure
a repeated self_refire_target must either change that target artifact or cite residual_capture_refs with exact unblock conditions
same-lane closeout must select the latest receipt for the assigned lane by append/source-line evidence before reading global latest-run state
a pass claim with no concrete edit must be typed as nothing_to_refine or blocked_with_residual_recheck and must carry residual lifecycle or fixed-point evidence
private_state_boundary_assertions: fixture inputs may contain synthetic landing summaries, schema-only rows, class ids, redacted handles, and macro reconstruction paths only

receipt rows must not embed real raw seed text, prompt shelf bodies, provider payload bodies, live Task Ledger rows, operator thread bodies, HUD/browser/cockpit state, private memory bodies, prediction material, release packets, recipient packets, hosted-public artifacts, or website surfaces
acceptance_predicates_cannot_fake: wave_1_organ_ids must have exactly one closeout decision row per landed organ
refinement_result=fixture_manifest_refined or validator_contract_refined must name owner_surface and changed_surface_ref
refinement_result=nothing_to_refine must carry stewardship_checked=true, next_best_lane_checked, next_best_lane_result, and reentry_condition
missing_closeout_count must remain non-zero for the missing-closeout negative fixture and observed_negative_cases must name organ_landing_without_refinement_or_typed_nothing
error_codes must be a subset of normalized pattern_assimilation_step taxonomy rows
duplicate_receipt_ids must be present when duplicate_refinement_receipt_conflict is observed
macro_pattern_autonomy_process_runs_v1 rows must record validation_status and next_self_refire_direction before a run can claim closure
same_lane_receipt_selection must prove the latest row was selected within assigned_lane or operator_assigned_lane using latest_same_lane_receipt_ref, source line, and append index evidence
fixed_point_closeout_evidence must show ordered dry-run, truth-index, and readiness validation and must show readiness consumed the latest same-lane receipt before closure

residual_lifecycle_review must resolve every residual_capture_refs entry through Task Ledger authority, name reused refs, and include recheck commands before pass_with_residual_capture or blocked_with_residual_recheck can close
duplicate_target_refinement_decision must reject repeated self_refire_target.target_artifact_ref unless the target artifact changed or exact residual unblock conditions are cited

validation_status=pass with concrete_improvement_made=false must fail unless no_concrete_edit_failure_reason records typed nothing_to_refine or blocked_with_residual_recheck with the required receipt floor

cannot_fake_predicates.required_evidence: selection basis filters macro_pattern_autonomy_process_runs_v1.jsonl by assigned_lane or operator_assigned_lane and records the selected row ref, source line, and append index
cannot_fake_predicates.rejection: A receipt that reasons from global_latest_run_id without proving latest same-lane selection fails closed.

cannot_fake_predicates.required_evidence: fixed_point_closeout_evidence records ordered validation command positions, changed refs, readiness latest_run fields, and latest_run_validation_status
cannot_fake_predicates.rejection: A closeout that appends or edits a receipt but does not prove ordered dry-run, truth-index, readiness, and latest same-lane consumption is stale.

cannot_fake_predicates.required_evidence: residual_lifecycle_review resolves residual_capture_refs through Task Ledger authority, classifies new/reused/retired refs, records durable unblock text, and includes recheck commands for reused refs
cannot_fake_predicates.rejection: A pass_with_residual_capture or blocked_with_residual_recheck row without current residual lifecycle evidence cannot close.

cannot_fake_predicates.required_evidence: duplicate_target_refinement_decision proves the repeated self_refire_target target was changed by this run or cites residual_capture_refs with exact unblock conditions
cannot_fake_predicates.rejection: A repeated target with no artifact change and no exact blocker capture is a duplicate-target failure, not a closeout.

cannot_fake_predicates.required_evidence: no_concrete_edit_failure_reason is empty only when concrete_improvement_made=true; otherwise it must type nothing_to_refine or blocked_with_residual_recheck and cite the receipt evidence that makes the no-edit outcome durable
cannot_fake_predicates.rejection: validation_status=pass with concrete_improvement_made=false and no typed no-concrete-edit evidence fails.

same_lane_closeout_receipt_predicate_con.public_private_boundary_note: This predicate contract may cite macro reconstruction artifact paths, source-line numbers, append indexes, Task Ledger ids, and stable failure-code ids only. It must not include raw seed text, prompt/provider/operator bodies, HUD/browser/cockpit state, release packets, recipient packets, website artifacts, private memory bodies, prediction material, or market-private evidence.
same_lane_closeout_receipt_predicate_con.anti_claim: This predicate contract strengthens macro-side pattern-assimilation closeout receipts only. It does not implement pattern assimilation, run public builders, authorize public-root writes, resolve residuals, or certify public runtime behavior.

validator_contract_ratchet_v1.anti_claim: Pattern-assimilation receipt-field coverage proves only synthetic closeout-learning contract shape, negative cases, and claim ceilings. It does not ingest private lessons, promote doctrine, execute public code, consume live Task Ledger state, or authorize public-root writes.

anti_claim: This fixture proves organ-closeout learning mechanics over synthetic landing summaries; it does not prove that every macro lesson is source-available, does not authorize public projection, and does not copy private doctrine, raw seed, operator content, provider payloads, or live Task Ledger state.
private_state_exclusion_rules: Use synthetic organ landing summaries only.

Do not include real raw seed text, prompt shelf bodies, provider payload bodies, operator thread bodies, live Task Ledger rows, HUD/browser/cockpit state, prediction or market material, private memory bodies, release packets, publication packets, recipient packets, hosted-public artifacts, or website surfaces.
Allowed references are class ids, schema ids, synthetic fixture ids, redacted source capsules, and macro-side reconstruction artifact paths.
A private-state scan hit makes the fixture fail even if the closeout fields are otherwise complete.
minimum_public_safe_proof: all Wave 1 organ ids have one closeout decision row
one refinement case passes and names an owner surface
one typed nothing_to_refine case passes with stewardship and reentry fields
missing closeout case fails with the stable expected error codes
implementation_notes: Implement after all Wave 1 runtime organ receipts exist; this is the acceptance closeout, not a runtime organ.
Write the public skill and policy fresh from this manifest and synthetic fixtures.
Do not import live macro doctrine, raw seed text, live Task Ledger rows, operator transcripts, prompt bodies, provider payloads, release material, or hosted-public surfaces.
This manifest closes the first-wave fixture-manifest gap for pattern_assimilation_step; second-wave top-level organs still need their own canonical manifests before implementation.
